name: brandc
description: Brand compiler: author a Brand as data and emit the shared design-token contract as CSS (toCss), Tailwind v4 (toTailwindCss) and prefab wire (toPrefabTheme). Ships an example brand you can use as-is or override.

scripts.build: node scripts/clean.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/build-css.mjs
scripts.prepare: node scripts/clean.mjs && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node scripts/build-css.mjs
